subcodes.first_line: O wanderer in the path of God, though thou art far from hearth and home, and separated from thy kindred, and bereft of peace and shelter, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره حق اگر از خانمان دور و از خاندان مهجور و بی سر و سامان شدی ولی در
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
